project_identity.title: Silo Identifier
project_identity.description: Unique identifier for the local data repository. Maps directly to your physical file system.

dna_strategy.title: Architecture Strategy
dna_strategy.description: Defines the JSON-driven intelligence and validation rules for the agnostic DNA.

storage_strategy.title: Persistence Strategy
storage_strategy.description: Defines the physical medium for data crystallization (Local, GitHub, or Database).

fields.label: Strategic Interdependence Note
fields.description: La Arquitectura (DNA) controla la lógica, mientras que la Persistencia (Storage) controla el medio físico. Las credenciales de nube (GitHub/Vercel) se gestionan de forma segura a través de variables de entorno del servidor, eliminando la necesidad de configuración manual en esta interfaz.
